Directed 14 high-visibility cross-org recovery executions, including serving as bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring precise partner and engineering alignment.

Built an internal **AI agent** for drill planning and restructured discovery workflows using LLM-powered tooling, cutting planning cycle time by 39% and expanding drill capacity by 21% without adding headcount.

Translated user pain points from 20+ engineering stakeholders into a prioritized product roadmap, balancing near-term delivery cadence with a longer-term vision for self-service resilience across Azure's enterprise platform.

Improved data integrity and accelerated discovery by migrating documentation to an AI-powered **semantic search** tool with rigorous metadata standards, cutting developer lookup time by 83% and validating the solution via rapid prototype testing.

Defined a product strategy to reduce operational toil during region launches, running discovery with 20+ service teams to quantify **81 hours of manual effort** per region and building a roadmap to automate the highest-impact paths.

Partnered with engineering and operations to translate ecosystem partner needs into technical requirements, ensuring the automation roadmap balanced **near-term delivery** with a scalable longer-term infrastructure vision.

Enabled leadership to prioritize high-impact automation gaps by engineering a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, turning raw execution data into a clear, recurring product signal.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, **prioritizing the backlog** to resolve 40+ high-priority tickets and stabilize the developer intake process for a fast-moving, high-autonomy robotics team.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and Google profile to better match user discovery and intent signals.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying margin leaks and delivering a data-backed roadmap recommendation to close gaps at scale.

tailoring_notes: 'AI agent' woven into microsoft_ft bullet#5 — mirrors JD's 'AI agents transacting on-chain' and 'building working prototypes' framing, repositioning Cyrus's internal bot as direct evidence of the AI-builder trait SDF prioritizes.

'Steady delivery cadence' appears in microsoft_ft bullet#6 and amazon_robotics bullet#1 — mirrors the JD's exact phrase 'establish a steady delivery cadence with your team' under the 90-day expectation.

'Translate user pain points into crisp, actionable requirements' in microsoft_2023 bullet#2 — mirrors the JD's literal language: 'translate their needs and pain points into...crisp, actionable requirements.'

'Developer tooling ecosystem' and 'developer lookup time' in microsoft_2023 bullets — mirrors JD's 'developer experience and tooling' product area and 'developer-facing products (APIs, SDKs)' bonus criterion.

'Near-term delivery with longer-term vision' framing in microsoft_2022 bullet#3 and microsoft_ft bullet#6 — mirrors JD's 'balance the needs of the network today with the longer-term future you are building toward.'
'Go-to-market strategy' in pro_painters bullet#2 — mirrors JD family detection (GTM) and keeps the section relevant by framing it as user-intent and discovery work, not just marketing ops.
